title: FAA - UAS Testing in Columbia River Gorge

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Dear FOIA Officer,

Under the Freedom of Information Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552, I am requesting copies of the following records related to Unmanned Aircraft Systems (UAS) testing, certification, and operations within the geographic boundaries of the Columbia River Gorge National Scenic Area and surrounding vicinities.

Geographic Scope:
This request specifically encompasses UAS operations within:

- Hood River County, OR

- Wasco County, OR (including The Dalles Municipal Airport - KDLS)

- Skamania County, WA

- Klickitat County, WA (specifically the vicinities of Bingen, Husum, and Roland Lake)

Requested Records:

Certificates of Waiver or Authorization (COAs): All issued COAs, including original applications, maps of proposed flight paths, and supporting documentation, granted to the following entities between January 1, 1998, and the present:

- Insitu, Inc.

- The Boeing Company (specifically regarding Insitu or Phantom Works UAS programs).

- Hood Technology Corporation (or Hood Tech).

- Aerovel Corporation.

- Cloud Cap Technology (a subsidiary of Collins Aerospace/UTC).

Special Airworthiness Certificates (SACs): All SACs in the "Experimental" category issued for UAS research, development, and market survey to the entities listed above within the specified geographic scope and timeframe.

Restricted or Prohibited Airspace Requests: Any correspondence or formal requests from the listed entities to establish Temporary Flight Restrictions (TFRs) or designate restricted/warning areas over the Columbia River Gorge for "sensor calibration," "acoustic testing," or "system validation."

Incident & Safety Reports: Any records of UAS "mishaps," near-misses, unauthorized incursions, or property damage reports involving aircraft operated by the listed entities within the Portland and Seattle Flight Standards District Office (FSDO) jurisdictions.

Format of Records:
I request these records be provided in an electronic format (searchable PDF or digital data files).

Fee Waiver & Public Interest:
I am requesting a fee waiver as the disclosure of this information is in the public interest. I am a journalist and researcher investigating the historical and modern integration of military-grade surveillance technology into civilian and rural American airspace. This research explores the social, environmental, and privacy impacts of aerospace development within a Federally Protected National Scenic Area. The information retrieved will contribute significantly to public understanding of how "dual-use" technologies (tuna tracking vs. military surveillance) are tested and deployed in domestic environments.

Thank you for your assistance with this request. I look forward to receiving your determination within the 20-business-day statutory limit.

Sincerely,

Katherine Bertash
Editor, The Skamania Dispatch

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Kate Bertash
